content: Mouser RoHS compliance check: use str.startswith('rohs') AND 'compliant' in str to correctly exclude 'Not Compliant' strings

name: inventree-plugin-test-stub
description: InvenTree plugin tests require a conftest.py that stubs sys.modules['plugin'] with a minimal InvenTreePlugin class before any project imports, since InvenTree is not installed in dev/test environments
